column2: Values which needs to be loaded to HRP as UDT/Other Ids should be mapped to <qualifierlist>. From Product standpoint all 2000.REF values are loaded to <qualifierlist>

EDI values which are used to dervie benefit plan should be mapped to </benefitPlanMatchData>.

From product standpoint 2300.HD04 is mapped for medicare/medicaid and 2300.REF*CE is mapped for Commercial. If this is different for implementaions, appropriate changes needs to be done in Adaptor.

Product Mapping is done to create HRP versions for Amend and Terminate. Refer the asOfDate tab.
If Versioning is not needed, /enrollment/asOfDate can be hardcoded as 1/1/1800.
Product mapping is done on the expectaion that, input edi will contain either Practitioner Id /Supplier Id. Customisations needs to be done if there is any difference in this expectation.
This loop is not handled from Product Core since it is implementaion specific. If needed mapping needs to handled in Adaptor.
